name: ARIA Validation
description: Validate WAI-ARIA roles, required properties, broken ID references, and aria-hidden misuse.

name: Audio Description
description: Audit videos for audio description: <track kind="descriptions">, alternative links to described versions, and heuristic detection of videos that need audio description.

name: Autocomplete
description: Audit autocomplete attributes on form fields for personal data input purpose identification.

name: Autoplay
description: Detect media with autoplay: videos and audio that play automatically, muted state, and availability of pause/volume controls.

name: Buttons
description: Audit buttons: accessible names, faux buttons (onclick without role), label-in-name violations (2.5.3).

name: Captions
description: Audit video elements for caption and subtitle tracks: presence, validity (src, srclang), and embedded video detection.

name: Color Contrast
description: Check text color contrast ratios against WCAG AA and AAA thresholds.

name: Dark Mode
description: Audit prefers-color-scheme support: dark/light media queries, color-scheme meta tag and CSS property.

name: Forced Colors
description: Audit forced-colors and prefers-contrast support: Windows High Contrast Mode compatibility.

name: Form Errors
description: Audit form error handling: aria-invalid, aria-errormessage, error descriptions, and live regions.

name: Form Labels
description: Audit form controls for accessible names: label, aria-label, aria-labelledby, placeholder-only detection.

name: Grouped Fields
description: Audit grouped form controls: radio groups in fieldset/radiogroup, checkbox groups, fieldsets with legends.

name: Headings
description: Audit heading structure (h1-h6): hierarchy, skipped levels, empty headings, multiple h1s.

name: Hidden Content
description: Reveal hidden content and detect potentially problematic hiding techniques.

name: Images
description: Audit image alt text: missing alt, decorative images, suspicious alt text patterns.

name: Inverted Colors
description: Audit inverted-colors media query support: images, videos, and backgrounds that break when colors are inverted.

name: Landmarks
description: Audit semantic landmark regions: main, nav, banner, complementary, contentinfo, search.

name: Language
description: Audit page language: html lang attribute, BCP 47 validation, and language of parts.

name: Links
description: Audit links: empty links, generic text, faux links (href=#), new window warnings, anchor without href.

name: Live Regions
description: Audit ARIA live regions, implicit live roles, and status message patterns.

name: Meta Tags
description: Audit meta tags for accessibility: charset, description, color-scheme, theme-color, and http-equiv refresh.

name: New Window Links
description: Audit links with target=_blank: new window/tab warning, aria-label, sr-only text, and rel=noopener security.

name: Page Title
description: Audit page title: existence, descriptiveness, length, and coherence with h1.

name: Reduced Motion
description: Audit prefers-reduced-motion support: CSS animations/transitions and media query fallbacks.

name: Reduced Transparency
description: Audit prefers-reduced-transparency support: semi-transparent elements and opaque fallbacks.

name: Skip Links
description: Audit skip navigation links: existence, target validity, visibility on focus, and position as first focusable.

name: Tab Order
description: Visualize and audit keyboard tab order: positive tabindex, hidden focusable elements.

name: Text Spacing
description: Test if content is resilient to WCAG 1.4.12 text spacing adjustments.

name: Touch Targets
description: Check interactive element sizes against WCAG touch target minimums.

name: Video Controls
description: Audit video and audio elements for accessible controls: native controls attribute, custom player ARIA roles, and keyboard operability.

name: Viewport & Zoom
description: Audit viewport meta tag for zoom restrictions: user-scalable, maximum-scale, minimum-scale, and responsive width configuration.
